description: Style NoteThis summer is the season for fusion and prints, and creations by mineral embody these warm weather trends. These pieces are perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without loosing her cool. Product DescriptionPatchwork skirt with floral printed panels and pink top stitch, pink waistband and lace detail at hem, concealed zipper and button closure on left, inner liningMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
